name: SM2135 LED driver
description: The SM2135 output component exposes a SM2135 channel of a global [Component/Hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/sm2135#sm2135-component) as a float output.

config_entries.label: ID
config_entries.description: The id to use for this output component.

config_entries.label: Channel
config_entries.description: Chose the channel of the SM2135 chain of this output component.

config_entries.label: Sm2135 ID
config_entries.description: Manually specify the ID of the [Component/Hub](https://esphome.io/components/output/sm2135#sm2135-component). Use this if you have multiple SM2135 chains you want to use at the same time.
